headline.purpose: App title and single top-level heading per page.

title.purpose: Section headings, view name labels, filter panel titles.

body.purpose: Table cell values, filter descriptions, inline copy.

label.purpose: Column headers exclusively. Always uppercase with tracked letter-spacing.

mono.purpose: All numeric stat values in data tables. Enforces decimal alignment.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Floating layers only: dropdowns, tooltips, command palette, modals.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (color, opacity, border).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover state feedback (tab opacity, chip color).

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Button fill changes, row hover fill, input focus ring.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Navy fill communicates authority without visual noise.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #002D62; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1A3D75; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #002D62; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Quiet by default; border shifts to navy on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #0C1829; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #CDD4E2; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), color 100ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #002D62; color: #002D62; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #002D62; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Nav Tab Strip
components.description: Primary view switcher. Navy band is the identity anchor; red bottom border marks the active tab.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav-strip"><button class="ds-nav-tab ds-nav-tab--active">Hitters</button><button class="ds-nav-tab">SP Rankings</button><button class="ds-nav-tab">RP Rankings</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav-strip { background: #002D62; padding: 8px 12px; display: flex; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-tab { background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 100ms, border-color 100ms; } .ds-nav-tab:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); } .ds-nav-tab--active { color: #FFFFFF; border-bottom-color: #BF0D3E; } .ds-nav-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Selection filter. White at rest, navy fill when selected. Used for position, team, and time-window filters.
components.css: .ds-chip-group { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-chip { background: #FFFFFF; color: #677286; border: 1px solid #CDD4E2; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms, color 100ms, border-color 100ms; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #EFF3FA; } .ds-chip--selected { background: #002D62; color: #FFFFFF; border-color: #002D62; } .ds-chip--selected:hover { background: #1A3D75; border-color: #1A3D75; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #002D62; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Search and text input. White fill, hairline border, navy focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0C1829; border: 1px solid #CDD4E2; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 10px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #677286; opacity: 1; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #002D62; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 45, 98, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #EFF3FA; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Primary UI surface. Strong headers, clean rows, monospace stat values.
components.html:
PlayerComposite ▲xwOBAZ-Score
Mike Trout0.84.3982.10
Juan Soto0.79.3851.87
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-th { background: #E2E8F3; color: #0C1829; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #CDD4E2; position: sticky; top: 0; } .ds-th--active { color: #1A3D75; } .ds-th--sortable { cursor: pointer; } .ds-th--sortable:hover { color: #002D62; } .ds-tr { background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #CDD4E2; transition: background-color 100ms; } .ds-tr:hover { background: #EFF3FA; } .ds-td { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0C1829; } .ds-td--mono { font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; text-align: right; }

components.name: Trend Badge
components.description: Hot/cold trend signal on prospect and stat cells. Surface Header background keeps red text scarce.
components.html: 🔥 Hot🧊 ColdRostered
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--hot { background: #E2E8F3; color: #BF0D3E; } .ds-badge--cold { background: #EFF3FA; color: #677286; } .ds-badge--rostered { background: #1A3D75; color: #FFFFFF; }

narrative.overview:
A purpose-built analytical workbench for fantasy baseball managers who think like scouts. Every decision on the screen — color, weight, density — comes from one question: does this help the manager make a call faster? The interface brings MLB's own visual language (Navy authority, Red urgency) into a product context where data is the protagonist and chrome is the support staff.

The palette is overtly sport-native. MLB Navy (#002D62) anchors structure and hierarchy; MLB Red (#BF0D3E) appears only where the data demands attention — active states, live trend signals, high-rank indicators. The surface is white and near-white with a cool navy tint, never warm, never cream. Depth comes from tonal layering, not shadows. The single typeface (Geist Variable) covers every role from column headers to stat values; no display face, no serif callout, no second family.

This system explicitly rejects: the generic shadcn/Vercel defaults; the ESPN/Yahoo portal aesthetic; and the teal palette that existed before this system.
keyCharacteristics: MLB Navy (#002D62) header band gives the tool an unmistakable sport-native identity from first load
MLB Red (#BF0D3E) appears on ≤5% of any screen — its scarcity is what makes it readable as a signal
Tables are the primary surface: strong column headers, clear hover and selection states, monospace data values
Single typeface (Geist Variable + Geist Mono Variable) with no secondary faces
Cool navy direction on all neutral surfaces — no warm tints, no cream, no beige

rules.name: The Red Scarcity Rule
rules.body: MLB Red (#BF0D3E) is reserved for active selection indicators and genuine urgency signals. ≤5% screen area per view. Never decorative.

rules.name: The Navy-Tint Discipline Rule
rules.body: Every neutral surface uses the same cool navy hue direction (~254°). Warm tints are prohibited.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Variable and Geist Mono Variable are the only typefaces. No display font, no serif, no second sans.

rules.name: The Mono-Data Rule
rules.body: Every numeric stat cell renders in Geist Mono Variable. Mixed proportional/monospace rendering in stat tables is prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow appears only on floating layers (modals, popovers, tooltips).

dos: Do use MLB Navy (#002D62) as the header band fill — the identity anchor
Do render every numeric stat column in Geist Mono Variable
Do apply uppercase + 0.06em letter-spacing to every column header
Do keep MLB Red (#BF0D3E) to ≤5% of screen area per view
Do use the cool navy direction on all neutral surfaces
Do target WCAG AA contrast: ≥4.5:1 body text, ≥3:1 large text
Do use box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 45, 98, 0.12) on floating layers only
donts: Don't use the shadcn default achromatic palette (chroma-0 tokens)
Don't use the old teal palette (teal-950, teal-700, oklch hue 180–210 range)
Don't use warm neutrals: cream, beige, sand, warm gray
Don't use MLB Red on non-active, non-destructive, non-urgent elements
Don't use border-left/border-right wider than 1px as a colored card accent
Don't add shadow to flat content surfaces
